completed_tasks.name: Phase 06 discuss-phase — identify gray areas, lock decisions D-01..D-08

remaining_tasks.name: Execute Phase 06 plans (Realtime, responsive, animations, a11y, C-01/C-02 fixes)
Phase 07 — Security Hardening + Express removal (later, separate phase)

human_actions_pending.context: Discuss-phase is fully committed; nothing is mid-implementation.

research_dependencies.item: Confirm current (2026) Supabase Realtime authorization/RLS behavior for postgres_changes — does the supabase_realtime publication + table RLS withhold row payloads from pending/anon sockets?

decisions.decision: 06-UI-SPEC.md is the authoritative visual/interaction contract; /frontend-design runs as an execution-polish layer ONLY within the locked tokens
decisions.rationale: Reconciles the ROADMAP 'MUST invoke /frontend-design' mandate with the already-approved UI-SPEC without re-litigating it
Polish pass must not silently override the approved UI-SPEC

decisions.decision: Realtime notification = count-only toast + 'Load new' pill, both fire on INSERT; no mid-scroll auto-insert
decisions.rationale: Resolves the toast-vs-pill ambiguity in UI-SPEC — they coexist in one C-01 stack

decisions.decision: Defense-in-depth Realtime gating: subscribe only when isBilling/isAdmin + count-only payload + researcher confirms RLS withholds rows from pending/anon sockets
decisions.rationale: Matches UI-gate + DB-RLS project pattern; built to pass the Phase 07 security audit clean

decisions.decision: Realtime unit-tested by mocking the Supabase channel in vitest; live behavior verified in UAT
decisions.rationale: Cheap deterministic CI coverage; real INSERT path checked manually

decisions.decision: C-01 fix = custom ToastContext on existing Toast.tsx primitives (sonner rejected)
decisions.rationale: Honors the 'minimize external deps' value; existing primitive already has spring/swipe/a11y

decisions.decision: WCAG AA verified with BOTH jest-axe (CI, dev-only dep) AND a manual keyboard/focus/screen-reader walkthrough at close
decisions.rationale: Matches the Fortune-500 quality bar; automated catches regressions, manual catches flow/announce issues

decisions.decision: Apply UI-SPEC C-02 verbatim — .limit(2000) + 10-min staleTime on the ['artifact-variants'] query

uncommitted_files.note: PRE-EXISTING (modified before this session) — unrelated to Phase 06; do NOT sweep into Phase 06 commits

next_action: Run `/clear` then `/gsd-plan-phase 06` to produce the Phase 06 plan set. The planner MUST treat 06-UI-SPEC.md as authoritative (D-01) and dispatch the researcher to confirm the Supabase Realtime RLS/authorization model (D-04).
context_notes: Phase 06 is unusual: the approved, exhaustive 06-UI-SPEC.md already locks the entire visual/interaction system, so discuss-phase only resolved the four genuinely-open decisions (design-pass authority, toast mechanism, Realtime gating, a11y verification) plus three sensible-default smaller items. All eight decisions live in 06-CONTEXT.md as D-01..D-08. Nothing is mid-implementation — clean pause right after context capture, ready to plan. Prior HANDOFF.json was a stale Phase 04 handoff (now-closed) and was overwritten.
